Document:
# Spell Mechanics
This page describes how spells are cast, how their effects are applied, and how the system resolves spell interactions.
## Spell Components
Spells in OpenEdge 14 use the action system. Each spell is an action entity with: - A mana cost (validated before casting) - An effect (damage, heal, buff, etc.) - A cooldown - Stat requirements (minimum INT for some spells)
## Casting Flow
1. Player activates spell action | 2. OE14ActionManaCostSystem validates mana | 3. If insufficient mana: reject, show message | 4. Deduct mana cost | 5. Apply spell effect | 6. Start cooldown timer
## Spell Storage
Spells are added to the action bar when an item with OE14SpellStorage is equipped:
- type: entity id: WandOfFire components: - type: OE14SpellStorage spells: - FireBolt - FireBall
## Content Under Construction
Full spell mechanics documentation coming soon. Key system files: [mono]Content.Shared/_OE14/Magic/OE14ActionManaCostComponent.cs[/mono] [mono]Content.Server/_OE14/Magic/OE14ActionManaCostSystem.cs[/mono]
